title: Centratherum camporum
taxonomy: Centratherum camporum belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it among the flowering plants, specifically within the order Asterales. At the kingdom level, it falls under Plantae, indicating its status as a plant species. Centratherum camporum is also classified under the order Compositae, which is another name for the Asteraceae family. Its classification reflects its relationship with other flowering plants that share similar characteristics.
